_paths_note: Paths can be relative to tools/sprite_pipeline/ (resolved by pipeline_run.py) or absolute. output_root is always overridden by pipeline_run.py.
_meshes_note: chr050_0 = body (textured), chr050_1 = specular highlights (hide), chr050_2 = cel-shading outline (black material)
_posterize_note: Discretize body colors to N levels per channel for cel-shaded look. 3-5 sweet spot.
